title: Property Consultant - Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services:
Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services!
